cases.name: keeps workflow gates out of vision
cases.input: Create a VISION.md with Merge by Default and Needs Sign-Off sections.
cases.expected: Put project direction in VISION.md and route autonomy gates to workflow docs.

cases.name: requires explicit update request
cases.input: Requested work conflicts with existing VISION.md, but the user did not ask to update vision.
cases.expected: Raise the contradiction and ask which direction wins; do not edit VISION.md.

cases.name: runs lightweight init grill
cases.input: Initialize VISION.md for a new project with sparse docs.
cases.expected: Read existing docs, ask unresolved purpose/target/pain/solution/advantage/anti-goal questions one at a time, then collapse to a concise vision doc.
